package rulecoverage

func NegativeViperGetInHotPath() string {
    ruleID := "viper_get_in_hot_path"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`viper.GetString(\"key\")` or `viper.GetInt(\"key\")` inside handler functions or loops"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
